table.title: Traffic Analysis by Applications
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow httpRequestHost!="" | eval httpRequestHost = lower(httpRequestHost) | eval latency = (flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds) / 1000000 | stats distinct_count(connectionId) AS "Requests" sum(octetDeltaCount) AS "Total Traffic" sum(packetDeltaCount) AS "Total Packets" avg(latency) AS "Avg. Latency (sec)" by httpRequestHost | eventstats sum(Requests) AS total_req | eval perc_req = round(Requests * 100 / total_req, 2) | rename httpRequestHost AS "Application", perc_req AS "Percent of Requests" | fields "Application", "Requests", "Percent of Requests", "Total Traffic", "Total Packets", "Avg. Latency (sec)"

table.title: Traffic Analysis by Servers
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | eval latency = (flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds) / 1000000 | stats distinct_count(connectionId) AS "Requests" sum(octetDeltaCount) AS "Total Traffic" sum(packetDeltaCount) AS "Total Packets" avg(latency) AS "Avg. Latency (sec)" by appID | eventstats sum(Requests) AS total_req | eval perc_req = round(Requests * 100 / total_req, 2) | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT appName | eval appName = if(isnull(appName), appID, appName) | rename appName AS "Server", perc_req AS "Percent of Requests" | fields "Server", "appID", "Requests", "Percent of Requests", "Total Traffic", "Total Packets", "Avg. Latency (sec)"

table.title: Traffic Analysis by Applications and Servers
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | eval httpRequestHost = lower(httpRequestHost) | eval latency = (flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds) / 1000000 | stats distinct_count(connectionId) AS "Requests" sum(octetDeltaCount) AS "Total Traffic" sum(packetDeltaCount) AS "Total Packets" avg(latency) AS "Avg. Latency (sec)" by httpRequestHost, appID | eventstats sum(Requests) AS total_req | eval perc_req = round(Requests * 100 / total_req, 2) | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT appName | eval appName = if(isnull(appName), appID, appName) | rename httpRequestHost AS "Application", appName AS "Server", perc_req AS "Percent of Requests" | fields "Server", "appID", "Application", "Requests", "Percent of Requests", "Total Traffic", "Total Packets", "Avg. Latency (sec)"
